name: Volage
tagline: A cigar that doesn't wait for an occasion.
homeLede: A long, slow Canonazo built for the hour you give yourself, creamy at the first draw, full-bodied to the last.
narrative: The first draw is creamy and slow. Wood arrives, followed by coffee, and a lingering sweetness that holds while the spice walks in. Hand-rolled in Java, it is born from tobacco grown in the volcanic soil at the foot of the Argopuro range, from Havana seed that has learned what Indonesia tastes like.
The 24-carat gold leaf laid by hand on every Mariposa is the brand's signature. It stands as a quiet reminder that the finer things in life are meant to be enjoyed.

specs.label: Construction
specs.value: Three-part · entubado bunching · Cuban triple cap

tasting.note: Creamy and woody, grounded by an underlying note of coffee.
The creaminess lingers as a rich sweetness begins to emerge.
Spice arrives, the sweetness holds, and deep earth closes the smoke.
